rationale: Entity-name blank at the top of the body. Domestic-Maine filing → entity.name (per schema-gaps/2026-04-30-entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction.md). MLC-3 is domestic-only by §3025 scope.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=329.0); enum_select value 'address'.

label_verbatim: [ ] B. change of clerk and address
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=329.0); enum_select value 'clerk_and_address'.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=353.8); enum_select value 'clerk'.

label_verbatim: [ ] D. change in name of current clerk
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=352.9); enum_select value 'clerk_name'.
Existing clerk name on record. Same key as NP_CLKRA-3 / CORP_CLKRA-3.

label_verbatim: SECOND: (street, city, state and zip code) of current clerk
rationale: Existing clerk address on record. New key in the clerk_change.* namespace — CLKRA-3 doesn't capture current address (it only asks for the current name when modify_existing), but MLC-3 captures both for the §3025 dual-recital pattern. Single-line combined address (street + city + state + zip in one widget).

label_verbatim: THIRD: (name of new clerk or new name of current clerk)
rationale: New clerk name (when change_type ∈ {'clerk', 'clerk_and_address'}) OR new name of the current clerk (when change_type = 'clerk_name'). Same key as NP_CLKRA-3 — clerks for nonprofits/churches under §3025 are always noncommercial (no CRA model).

label_verbatim: THIRD: (physical location, not P.O. Box - street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Physical address of the new clerk (or new address when change_type = 'address'). PO boxes prohibited per the parenthetical. Same key as NP_CLKRA-3.

label_verbatim: THIRD: (mailing address if different from above)
rationale: Optional mailing address; left blank if the same as the physical address. Same key as NP_CLKRA-3.
Date the change-of-clerk filing is signed.

First authorized signer (Shape D — combined name+capacity, paired with a wet-ink (signature) line that has no AcroForm widget). Page-1 footnote requires at least one signer (the clerk or another duly authorized officer); this slot is required. Indexed pattern matches LLC_MLLC-15 / LLC_MLLC-13A precedent for forms with two parallel signer slots.

Second authorized signer (Shape D). The §3025 statute requires only one signer (the clerk or another duly authorized officer); this second slot is optional and used when the corporation's bylaws require dual authorization or when both the outgoing and incoming clerks countersign.
